title: Cindy Drainville
content:
People.ContactEmail cdrainville@mtiplus.ca
Cindy is a paralegal in our immigration law division in Quebec. She graduated from Bart College in 2014 with a diploma in paralegal technology. She joined the field of immigration law and business immigration in 2018.
She primarily assists in files related to temporary relocations in Canada and the United States. More recently, she has prepared requests applications for Canadian and U.S. permanent residency.
